---
name: shadcn-order-form
description: 'Use when building or modifying the order form UI for the order-trade-flow project. Triggers: adding Shadcn/UI components, styling the NewOrderSingle form, Select for symbol/side, Input for quantity/price, Button submit, Form layout with Shadcn primitives, component composition, controlled form fields in Next.js + React.'
---

# Shadcn/UI — Order Form Components

## When to Use
- Adding or updating any Shadcn/UI component in the order form
- Building the `NewOrderSingleForm` component or its subcomponents
- Setting up Shadcn/UI in the Next.js project for the first time
- Ensuring consistent visual design across form fields

## Setup (one-time)

```bash
npx shadcn@latest init
```

Choose: TypeScript → yes, style → Default, base color → Slate, CSS variables → yes, tailwind.config path → default, components alias → `@/components`, utils alias → `@/lib/utils`.

Install the required components for this project:

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add form select input button label card
```

## Component Map — NewOrderSingle Form

| Field     | Shadcn Component | Notes                              |
|-----------|------------------|------------------------------------|
| Símbolo   | `<Select>`       | Options: PETR4, VALE3, VIIA4       |
| Lado      | `<Select>`       | Options: Compra (B), Venda (S)     |
| Quantidade| `<Input>`        | type="number", integer constraints |
| Preço     | `<Input>`        | type="number", decimal constraints |
| Submeter  | `<Button>`       | type="submit", full-width          |

## Required Component Files

```
order-generator/
  app/
    components/
      orders/
        NewOrderSingleForm.tsx   # Main form container
        SymbolSelect.tsx         # Reusable symbol picker
        SideSelect.tsx           # Reusable side picker
        QuantityInput.tsx        # Reusable quantity field
        PriceInput.tsx           # Reusable price field
        OrderResult.tsx          # Displays API response
  lib/
    utils.ts                     # cn() helper (auto-generated by Shadcn)
```

## Component Patterns

### Form Shell
Always wrap with Shadcn `<Form>` (which wraps `react-hook-form`'s `FormProvider`):

```tsx
import { Form } from '@/components/ui/form'
import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form'
import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod'

const form = useForm<NewOrderSingleFormValues>({
  resolver: zodResolver(newOrderSingleSchema),
  defaultValues: { symbol: '', side: '', quantity: undefined, price: undefined },
})

return (
  <Form {...form}>
    <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-6">
      {/* fields */}
    </form>
  </Form>
)
```

### Select Field (Symbol / Side)
Use `<FormField>` + `<Select>` to keep Shadcn's accessible label/error wiring:

```tsx
<FormField
  control={form.control}
  name="symbol"
  render={({ field }) => (
    <FormItem>
      <FormLabel>Símbolo</FormLabel>
      <Select onValueChange={field.onChange} defaultValue={field.value}>
        <FormControl>
          <SelectTrigger>
            <SelectValue placeholder="Selecione o ativo" />
          </SelectTrigger>
        </FormControl>
        <SelectContent>
          <SelectItem value="PETR4">PETR4</SelectItem>
          <SelectItem value="VALE3">VALE3</SelectItem>
          <SelectItem value="VIIA4">VIIA4</SelectItem>
        </SelectContent>
      </Select>
      <FormMessage />
    </FormItem>
  )}
/>
```

### Input Field (Quantity / Price)
Use `type="number"` and pass `valueAsNumber` through `register` or `field`:

```tsx
<FormField
  control={form.control}
  name="quantity"
  render={({ field }) => (
    <FormItem>
      <FormLabel>Quantidade</FormLabel>
      <FormControl>
        <Input
          type="number"
          placeholder="Ex: 100"
          {...field}
          onChange={e => field.onChange(e.target.valueAsNumber)}
        />
      </FormControl>
      <FormMessage />
    </FormItem>
  )}
/>
```

### Card Layout
Wrap the form in a `<Card>` for visual containment:

```tsx
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'

<Card className="w-full max-w-md mx-auto mt-8">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Nova Ordem</CardTitle>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
    {/* form */}
  </CardContent>
</Card>
```

## Reusability Rules
- Each field component (`SymbolSelect`, `SideSelect`, etc.) receives `control` as a prop and renders its own `<FormField>`. Do NOT pass raw `register` — use `control`.
- Export each field component individually so they can be tested or reused in other forms.
- Never hardcode labels inside generic field components — accept a `label` prop.

## Accessibility Checklist
- Every `<Input>` and `<Select>` must have a `<FormLabel>` wired via `htmlFor` (Shadcn handles this automatically via `FormItem` context).
- `<FormMessage>` must always be present to surface validation errors to assistive technology.
- `<Button type="submit">` must have descriptive text ("Enviar Ordem", not just "Submit").
